query:
INSERT INTO follow_up_sequences (name, day_offset, subject_template, body_template) VALUES
('Day 3 Follow-Up', 3, 'Quick follow-up on {{business_name}}''s website', 'Hey {{first_name}},

Just circling back on the audit I sent over. Did you get a chance to check it out?

I know you''re busy running the business, so I''ll keep this short: your website is costing you money right now. The audit breaks down exactly how much and what to fix.

Want me to walk you through it? Takes 10 minutes.

- Cameron'),
('Day 7 Follow-Up', 7, 'Last call for {{business_name}}', '{{first_name}},

This is my last email—I promise I won''t bug you after this.

Your website has {{specific_issue}}. That''s turning away customers who are ready to buy.

If you want to fix it, reply with "yes" and I''ll send you a proposal. If not, no worries—I''ll move on.

- Cameron'),
('Day 14 Breakup', 14, 'I''m out', '{{first_name}},

I''m closing your file. If you ever want to fix that {{specific_issue}}, you know where to find me.

Good luck with the business.

- Cameron');
